turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hi, I want to consult a pulmonologist. I've been coughing for weeks and two antibiotics courses haven't helped.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: That sounds frustrating. Let's get you an appointment. Your name and number please?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Thank you Dhruv. Dr. Amol Sawant is our pulmonologist. He's available this Thursday and next Monday.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Thursday 9 AM is the first slot. Confirmed for Dhruv Chitale with Dr. Amol Sawant. SMS coming your way. Hope you feel better soon!

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Thanks. Can I bring previous X-rays?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Absolutely, please bring any previous chest X-rays or CT scans and prescriptions. It'll help Dr. Sawant get a full picture.
